/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/franka_r3_robot_server.dir/src/franka_r3_robot_server.cpp.o -o franka_r3_robot_server  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib libexamples_common.a libweighted_ik.a libgeofik.a /usr/local/lib/libruckig.so /usr/local/lib/libfranka.so.0.17.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.8.1.1 -Wl,--as-needed
